code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [Education_GradeSync] --> Opened: Issue created
    
    Opened --> Triage: Auto-added to project
    
    Triage --> Todo: Accepted & prioritized
    Triage --> Closed: Rejected / Duplicate
    Triage --> NeedsInfo: More information needed
    
    NeedsInfo --> Triage: Information provided
    NeedsInfo --> Closed: No response
    
    Todo --> InProgress: Work started
    
    InProgress --> InReview: PR opened
    InProgress --> Blocked: Dependencies / Issues
    InProgress --> Todo: Paused / Deprioritized
    
    Blocked --> InProgress: Unblocked
    Blocked --> Todo: Alternative approach
    
    InReview --> InProgress: Changes requested
    InReview --> Done: PR merged
    
    Done --> [Education_ClassroomService]: Issue closed
    Closed --> [Education_GradeSync]
    
    note right of Opened
        Labels applied:
        - Type (Education_ContentCDN)
        - Area (Education_ContentCDN)
    end note
    
    note right of Triage
        Platform/Owner reviews:
        - Is it valid?
        - What's the priority?
        - Who should work on it?
    end note
    
    note right of Todo
        Work is planned:
        - Priority: P0-P3
        - Effort: XS-XL
        - Owner Team assigned
    end note
    
    note right of InProgress
        Active development:
        - Branch created
        - Commits happening
        - Regular updates
    end note
    
    note right of InReview
        PR review:
        - CODEOWNERS review
        - CI checks passing
        - Approvals required
    end note
    
    note right of Done
        Completed:
        - PR merged
        - Changes deployed
        - Issue auto-closed
    end note
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为Education GradeSync项目设计一个Issue生命周期流程图。核心是从Issue创建开始，经过Triage评审，最终到Done或Closed。起点和终点要分别关联到GradeSync和ClassroomService这两个服务。
明白了。Triage之后有哪些分支？我看到可能有接受、拒绝，还有一种需要补充信息的情况？
对，Triage有三个去向：Accepted & prioritized到Todo，Rejected或Duplicate直接Closed，还有一种More information needed到NeedsInfo状态。NeedsInfo后续可能回到Triage，也可能因无响应而Closed。
好的，主干画好了。Todo之后进入InProgress，这里应该也有几个分支吧？比如被阻塞或者暂停的情况？
没错。InProgress可以推进到InReview（PR opened），也可能Blocked（依赖问题），或者Paused/Deprioritized回退到Todo。Blocked之后可以Unblocked回到InProgress，也可以走Alternative approach回到Todo。
InReview有两个结果：Changes requested回InProgress，PR merged则到Done。Done之后Issue closed，流程终点是Education_ClassroomService。另外Closed状态要闭环回到Education_GradeSync。
需要给关键状态加注释说明吗？比如Opened时的标签规则，Triage的评审要点，Todo的优先级和工时评估？
是的，六个关键状态都需要注释。Opened要标注Type和Area都是Education_ContentCDN；Triage写平台评审的三个问题；Todo写P0-P3优先级、XS-XL工时、Owner分配；InProgress写分支创建、提交、更新；InReview写CODEOWNERS、CI、审批；Done写合并、部署、自动关闭。
完成。整个流程从GradeSync的Issue创建开始，经过Triage分流，主干经Todo→InProgress→InReview→Done到达ClassroomService闭环，分支覆盖NeedsInfo、Blocked、Closed等异常路径，六个状态都配了详细注释。
